creator: sat@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with corrections, thanks! 

Dear Gea-Suan, 

1. We can't remove build dependencies in p5- ports as we might need 
them in test targets, before they are installed. 
2. We don't need to dirrmtry directories belonging to our deps, it 
might actually hurt. 
3. A comment line in pkg-plist is gratuitous and its addition should 
not be part of an update, unless the maintainer does it. 

Thanks for your support!
